title: Staff Engineer - AI Engineer
company_focus: Digital Product Engineering with global consulting services
description:
Company Description

We are a Digital Product Engineering company that is scaling
in a big way! We build products, services, and experiences
that inspire, excite, and delight. We work on a scale across
all devices and digital mediums, and our people exist
everywhere in the world (17000 plus experts across 39
countries, to be exact). Our work culture is dynamic and
non-hierarchical. We are looking for great new colleagues.
That is where you come in!

Job Description

Role: AI Engineer Location: Remote, USA Duration: 6 Months
Contract with possible extension

Job Overview:

- AI Engineer with 6-9 years of experience required along with
  (Optional) 2-4 years working in manufacturing domain.
- Hands-on experience in shop floor operations, production
  planning, and systems including MES, SCADA, and ERP.
  Proficient in industrial protocols (OPC-UA, MQTT, Modbus)
  with ability to bridge OT/IT systems for real-time data
  extraction.
- Applied experience with OEE, Six Sigma, SPC, and lean
  methodologies to drive measurable gains in yield, uptime,
  and efficiency.
- LLM/AI: Hugging Face, LangChain, Open AI API.
- RAG pipelines: use Hugging Face, LangChain, and Open AI API
  to architect RAG pipelines and integrate generative AI
  into enterprise cloud environments.
- Strong communicator — able to translate complex model
  outputs into clear, actionable recommendations for
  operations and executive stakeholders. Python, R, SQL
  LLM/AI: Hugging Face, LangChain, Open AI API, RAG
  pipelines

Qualifications

Must have:

- AI Engineer with 6-9 years of experience.
- Hands-on experience in shop floor operations, production
  planning, and systems including MES, SCADA, and ERP.



Additional Information

Disclaimer: Nagarro is an equal opportunity employer. We
celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an
inclusive environment for all employees. All qualified
applicants will be afforded equal employment opportunities
without discrimination based on race, creed, color, national
origin, sex, age, disability, or marital status.
responsibilities: Architect and build RAG pipelines using Hugging Face, LangChain, and OpenAI API
Integrate generative AI solutions into enterprise cloud environments
Bridge OT/IT systems for real-time data extraction from manufacturing shop floors
Apply OEE, Six Sigma, SPC, and lean methodologies to drive measurable gains in yield, uptime, and efficiency
Translate complex model outputs into clear, actionable recommendations for operations and executive stakeholders
Work with MES, SCADA, and ERP systems for production planning and shop floor operations
Utilize industrial protocols (OPC-UA, MQTT, Modbus) for data connectivity
use_cases: Manufacturing shop floor AI-driven optimization and automation
Real-time industrial data extraction and analysis from OT systems
Production planning and efficiency improvement using AI
Enterprise generative AI integration in manufacturing environments
Translating AI model outputs into operational and executive decision support
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves hands-on building of AI/LLM systems —
specifically architecting RAG pipelines and integrating
generative AI into enterprise environments using LangChain,
Hugging Face, and OpenAI APIs. The engineer is directly
building and deploying AI systems, making this an ai-first
role.
